message:
perf(spec-evolution): optimize filtered navigation with direct lookup maps

Replace two-step navigation lookups (Map->index->array[index±1]) with
precomputed prevByCommitIdx and nextByCommitIdx maps for O(1) direct
navigation. Also memoize firstFilteredIdx for fallback jumps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
